title: Monetary Policy Shift
economic_mechanism: Central bank tightening raises borrowing costs, slows credit expansion, and signals concern about inflation or external balance.
headline: Islami Bank approves US-based B100 Holdings as strategic investor in mCash
expected_effects: higher borrowing costs; bond yield rise; investment dampening

title: Food Price Pressure
economic_mechanism: Rising staple prices compress real incomes of the poor, raise wage demands, and feed into broader inflation expectations.
headline: Why prices rise at Khatungaj despite ample stocks
expected_effects: real income erosion for the poor; wage pressure; headline inflation rise
who_should_care: consumer sector; food importers; social protection agencies

title: External Liquidity Stress
economic_mechanism: Foreign exchange shortages constrain import financing, widen the informal premium, and force rationing of dollar-denominated obligations.
headline: Forex reserves fall to $29.38b after ACU payment
expected_effects: import compression; industrial input shortage; informal FX premium widening
who_should_care: trade finance banks; importers; currency desks

title: Geopolitical Risk
economic_mechanism: Regional conflicts, trade sanctions, or Gulf state policy shifts disrupt migrant labor markets, trade routes, and energy supply chains affecting Bangladesh.
headline: Middle East conflict may trigger energy shock, export risks for Bangladesh: PRI Report
expected_effects: remittance channel disruption; trade route uncertainty; energy price volatility

economic_mechanism: Regional conflicts, trade sanctions, or Gulf state policy shifts disrupt migrant labor markets, trade routes, and energy supply chains affecting Bangladesh.
